realm.name: privilege_revoke_wallet
realm.description: Create or review a task to revoke a Wallet.

realm.name: privilege_block_user
realm.description: Create or review a task to block a user. Also revokes any active wallets held by the user.

realm.name: privilege_unblock_user
realm.description: Create or approve a task to unblock a blocked user.

realm.name: privilege_show_all_tasks
realm.description: See all open and completed tasks (also if not 'owner' or 'reviewer'). Used for a team member in a teamleader role.

realm.name: privilege_revoke_solution
realm.description: Create or review a task to revoke the Wallet Solution.

clients.name: Wallet Backend
clients.description: Client registration for the Wallet Backend. redirect_uris must include the /auth/callback endpoint on the WalletBackend.
